stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
How does a Ring Laser Gyro sense rotational movements?

options.a: By detecting the phase shift between two laser beams traveling in opposite directions.
options.b: By measuring the difference in light intensity between the prisms.
options.c: By sensing the acceleration of the laser beams as they pass through the prisms.
options.d: By detecting the frequency of the laser beam as it passes through each prism.
